title: achnatherum occidentale
intro: Achnatherum occidentale, also known as Western Needlegrass, is a perennial grass native to the western United States and Canada. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to provide several health benefits, including reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and supporting immune function. Achnatherum occidentale can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
